content.rendered:
The only thing I really need right now in this cancer fight is donations. I hate asking this. It pains me to ask this. I’m a person who is always giving to the community and people and honestly feel ashamed to ask for help (even though people tell me I shouldn’t be). With me not being able to work full time between the chemo treatments every other week and the abdominal pain, all of my bills are still coming in. It’s going to be pretty tough for me here on out. Please consider donating if you can.

Here’s some places you can donate:

  • PayPal
  • Venmo
  • CashApp
  • GoFundMe

or simply go to Shell Lake State Bank and you can make a donation there.

Thank you for considering donating. Words cannot express the emotions I feel in my heart from everyone and all I can say is THANK YOU for making my life with cancer just a little bit easier.

excerpt.rendered: The only thing I really need right now in this
